summary: Customer has waited 12 days for a replacement blender and says the order page still shows no carrier scan.
requested_action: Escalate fulfillment and send a same-day delivery update.

summary: Refund was approved seven business days ago but the card statement does not show the credit.
requested_action: Verify payment processor status and send refund trace details.

summary: Eight of twenty-four commercial coffee makers arrived with cracked reservoirs before a scheduled store opening.
requested_action: Authorize replacement shipment and assign an account manager callback.

summary: Customer expected the annual discount to apply immediately after switching from monthly billing.
requested_action: Explain proration and confirm next invoice amount.

summary: Customer waited 38 minutes in live chat and had to repeat the same warranty details to two agents.
requested_action: Apologize, summarize warranty next steps, and flag chat staffing coverage.

summary: Customer praised a support agent for quickly solving a missing invoice request.
requested_action: Share recognition with the support lead.

summary: Product arrived without printed setup instructions and the QR code on the box returns a 404 page.
requested_action: Send digital instructions and report the broken QR code.

summary: Freight delivery missed a scheduled appointment for gym equipment and the customer paid staff to wait onsite.
requested_action: Escalate carrier, offer goodwill credit, and confirm a new appointment.
